name: The Boreout
effect: Occupy a role without meaningful work to fill it. This card is considered resourced.

clauses.name: VISIBILITY PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If no one assigns new work: This card is considered busy.

clauses.name: RETENTION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: When a headcount review occurs: This card is considered critical to operations.

clauses.name: EROSION EFFECT
clauses.rule: Each turn this card remains unactivated: Its ATK decreases by 1, to a minimum of 1.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Does anyone know what this role does?
